title: Hermes Agent 5.0 (New Upgrades): HERMES BECAME ULTRA-HERMES!
summary: Hermes Agent 0.16 is a major release introducing a native desktop app for macOS, Linux, and Windows, an enhanced web dashboard with admin controls, remote gateway support for distributed deployments, fuzzy model search, and improved security. The update aims to make the agent platform easier to access and use across multiple surfaces.
